summary: A clip of Stephen Colbert's CBS Late Show monologue mocking the Department of Labor for tweeting 'American workers first' and hanging a large banner of the Secretary on its building. DOL reposted the late-night TV segment as a clapback. It is a talk-show monologue, not a produced, music-driven, youth-appeal spectacle.
notable_text: CBS logo; Colbert Late Show monologue about DOL banner
